mapper.sql: id, user_id AS userId, key_hash AS keyHash, name, expires_at AS expiresAt, is_active AS active, created_at AS createdAt
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO api_keys (id, user_id, key_hash, name, expires_at, is_active, created_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{keyHash}, #{name}, #{expiresAt}, #{active}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM api_keys WHERE user_id = #{userId}
